demo.name: Worn-Out Pistol
description: You can fire it... if you're truly desperate.
comment: There's a pirate superstition: if the pistol doesn't explode in your hands, it's a sign of good luck.

demo.name: Reliable Musket
description: It won't win any prizes for accuracy, but it never misfires - even in the foulest weather.
comment: Pirate wisdom says: You won't miss if you shoot at point-blank range.

demo.name: Reliable Musket

demo.name: Pistol
description: What's better than one shot? Two shots!
It fires gentle, with hardly any kick.
Just make sure you reload in time.
comment: There are many like it, but this one is mine.
